variables.notes: Chose outside shortlist because it is the clearest reported current financing-debt line. Excludes lease liabilities since 'Short-term lease liability' is presented separately and not selected.

candidates.why: Best available current tax payable/current tax liabilities label on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet current tax liability label. The same label appears twice across years, but the row label itself is the correct mapping.

candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities INVESTING ACTIVITIES
candidates.why: Despite the malformed label, the values equal operating cash flow after working-capital changes and before investing activities; best match for net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities INVESTING ACTIVITIES

variables.notes: Chosen because the values match net operating cash flow: 'before changes in working capital' plus 'Change in working capital' equals this line.
